requirementCueLines: BIS 209 Engaging Visual and Media Arts
BISIA 207 Introduction to Creative Writing: Words, Stories, Dialogues

The following degree requirements are required as of Autumn 2024 quarter. Students who entered the Interdisciplinary Arts (IA) major prior to Autumn 2024 have different requirements. Please see your Academic Advisor for questions and academic planning.
B WRIT 133 or B WRIT 134 or ENGL 131 or equivalent (5 credits)
B WRIT 135 or ENGL 141 or equivalent (5 credits)
Core Course: BISIA 219 Introduction to Interdisciplinary Arts (5 credits)
Art Studios and Art Workshops (IA:SW) Courses (15 credits)
Residency Requirement: 30 credits must be completed in residency at UW Bothell.

Interdisciplinary Practice & Reflection (IPR): The IPR requirement can overlap with the 70 credits of major coursework, or it can be completed through elective credits. Please see the IPR webpage for course options.

Upper Division Credit Policy: A maximum of 35 credits earned in 100- and 200-level courses may apply toward the major. Remaining credits must be earned in upper division courses (300-level and above).
BISIA 240 Visual and Media Arts Techniques
